notes: Strong didactic fit (not a thematic reskin): pure headless consensus sim unit-tested on the real invariants (floor(n/2)+1 quorum, minority-cannot-commit incl 3v3 even split, watchers fire ONLY on commit, deterministic ack order, stale re-merge). 3D scene makes majority-as-spatial-threshold visceral (beams sweep+align -> synchronized gold commit flash at quorum; minority arc stays pink/split). Player actively drives acks (L1), predicts lit watcher set (L2), names the majority partition side (L3 split-brain), and syncs stale nodes (L4). Watch/notify exercised via L2 watcher buoys + notifyWatchers().
